violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 03/10/2025

Gazpacho was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit in the steam table that was not turned on. Food was received an hour prior to inspection and recorded at 40 degrees Fahrenheit at receiving. After inspector review, food was deemed to be safe for immediate consumption. Establishment must keep cold foods refrigerated after delivery. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2023
